title: end-to-end sandbox validation gate (LS·4)

commands.stdoutTail: [companion] Folded feature deltas into living spec(s): todos (examples/bench-sandboxes/ls-4/specs/002-add-due-dates/.spec-context.json)

config:
livingSpecs:
  enabled: true
  capabilities:
    - name: todos
      match: ["src/todos/**"]

accumulation.before:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

- THEN a todo appears in the list

# Todos capability

accumulation.afterB:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

#### Scenario: add a todo
- WHEN a user types text and submits
- THEN a todo appears in the list

### Users can set a due date on a todo

#### Scenario: set a due date
- WHEN a user picks a date for a todo
- THEN the todo shows the due date

#### Scenario: clear a due date
- WHEN a user clears the date
- THEN the todo shows no due date
